home.heroSubtitle: Fast, reliable repairs for your home appliances in Queens, Nassau & Suffolk County

home.step2Desc: A certified technician arrives the same day
home.step3Desc: Your appliance is repaired quickly and professionally
home.ctaSubtitle: Call or text us now for same-day service

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: We repair all major home appliances

washer.name: Washer Repair
washer.description: Expert washing machine repair for all major brands. We fix leaks, drainage issues, spin problems, and more.

dryer.name: Dryer Repair
dryer.description: Professional dryer repair services. We handle heating issues, tumbling problems, and electrical faults.

range.name: Range & Oven Repair
range.description: Complete range, oven, and stove repair. Gas and electric models serviced.

dishwasher.name: Dishwasher Repair
dishwasher.description: Full dishwasher repair services. We fix drainage, cleaning, and mechanical issues.

refrigerator.name: Refrigerator Repair
refrigerator.description: Refrigerator and freezer repair for all brands. We handle cooling, ice maker, and compressor issues.

ac.name: Central A/C Repair
ac.description: Central air conditioning repair and maintenance. Stay cool with our expert HVAC services.

plumbing.name: Plumbing Services
plumbing.description: General plumbing repair services. We fix leaks, clogs, and pipe issues throughout your home.

services.brandList: Samsung, LG, Whirlpool, GE, Maytag, Frigidaire, KitchenAid, Bosch, Kenmore & More

about.title: About Same Day Service
about.subtitle: Your trusted local appliance repair experts
about.story: Same Day Service has been proudly serving the Queens, Nassau, and Suffolk County communities with fast, reliable home appliance repair. Owned and operated by Jay, our company is built on a simple promise: when your appliances break down, we show up the same day to fix them.
about.missionText: To provide the fastest, most reliable home appliance repair service in the tri-county area. We believe no one should have to wait days for essential home repairs.
about.value1Desc: Same-day service is not just our name - it's our guarantee
about.value2Desc: We use quality parts and stand behind every repair
about.value3Desc: Upfront pricing with no hidden fees or surprise charges
about.value4Desc: Our technicians are licensed, insured, and factory-trained

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Get in touch for fast, reliable appliance repair
contact.serviceAreaDetail: We proudly serve Queens (NYC), Nassau County, and Suffolk County on Long Island, NY
contact.sent: Message sent! We'll get back to you shortly.
